children.label: a
children.text: An officer who receives an appointment under is considered to have accepted his appointment on its effective date, unless he expressly declines the appointment.section 2121 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: An officer who has served continuously since he subscribed to the oath of office prescribed in is not required to take a new oath upon his appointment in a higher grade.section 3331 of title 5
